markdown:
#  Are pending commitments automatically synced with integrated ERP systems? 
##  Answer 
No. If your company has enabled the ERP Integrations tool, the data in a project's Commitments tool is NOT automatically synced between Procore and your Integrated ERP System. Data from a commitment in Procore is synced:
  * Upon clicking 'Send to ERP' if the [Direct Export feature](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/enable-or-disable-erp-direct-exports) has been enabled for commitments in your company's account.  
OR
  * Upon completion of a workflow applied to the commitment when the [Direct Export feature](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/enable-or-disable-erp-direct-exports) is enabled for commitments in your company's account, and a workflow is applied to the commitment.  
OR
  * After a commitment is sent to the ERP Integrations tool for accounting acceptance, and an accounting approver accepts the commitment for export to your integrated ERP system. This is the standard flow if the [Direct Export feature](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/enable-or-disable-erp-direct-exports) is NOT enabled for commitments in your company's account.


To learn more, see [Send a Commitment to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/send-a-commitment-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance).
## See Also
  * [What do I do when a commitment fails to export from the ERP Integrations tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-do-i-do-when-a-commimtment-fails-to-export-from-the-erp-integrations-tool)
  * [Why is my Procore project missing from the ERP Integrations tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-why-is-my-procore-project-missing-from-the-erp-integrations-tool)
  * [What is the accounting approver role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-accounting-approver-role)


In Procore, the term _integrated ERP System_ , is used to refer to _Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)_ software applications that can be configured to exchange data between Procore and a supported application using the Company level ERP Integrations tool. See [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
title: Are pending commitments automatically synced with integrated ERP systems?
